details.reasoning: Implementation successfully creates the PulseBoard channel plugin with nearly all rubric requirements met. Verified: @openclaw/pulseboard scoped name with setupEntry, openclaw.plugin.json with channels and configSchema, channel plugin using createChatChannelPlugin with direct/group chatTypes, textChunkLimit of 4000, outbound sendText capability, gateway, and messaging with normalizeTarget, defineChannelPluginEntry in index.ts, defineSetupPluginEntry in setup-entry.ts, and all new files in pulseboard directory with no modifications to existing files. Minor deduction: types.ts file is listed but content not fully visible in diff (though import references suggest interfaces exist). Additional minor note: implementation uses 'apiUrl' instead of 'boardUrl' mentioned in rubric, though this is semantically more appropriate for an API endpoint. The diff cutoff at inbound.ts appears to be display limitation rather than incomplete code. Overall implementation demonstrates proper OpenClaw plugin structure and pattern compliance.
